diagrams.title: Float vs Double Comparison
diagrams.description: Comparison of storage, precision, and range between float and double types in Java
elements: Suffix required for float: f or F
diagrams.purpose: Understand the differences and when to use each type

diagrams.title: IEEE 754 Float Representation
diagrams.description: 32-bit float storage format showing sign, exponent, and mantissa components
diagrams.purpose: Understand how floating-point values are stored internally

diagrams.title: Special Floating-Point Values
diagrams.description: Overview of special values in Java floating-point types following IEEE 754
elements: -0.0: Negative zero, equal to +0.0 but different representation
diagrams.purpose: Learn about special values and how to handle them in calculations
